items.title: US Senate bill seeks 100% tariffs on India, 4 other nations for buying Russian oil
items.desc: A bipartisan bill introduced in the US Senate proposes 100% tariffs on imports from the top five buyers of Russian oil or gas, including India, China, Slovakia, Hungary and Azerbaijan, to pressure Russia over its war in Ukraine.
